title: rubus × horriduliflorus
intro: Rubus × horriduliflorus is a hybrid species of raspberry, specifically a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus crataegifolius, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × horriduliflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rubus × horriduliflorus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being, particularly in traditional medicine practices.
